Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, json, glob, re

# Map: minute_token -> folder name
base = "./feishu-minutes"
folders = [f for f in os.listdir\(base\) if f.startswith\("artifact-"\) and os.path.isdir\(os.path.join\(base, f\)\)]

# Build metadata from the search results we already know
# Title and token extraction from folder names
minutes_meta = {}
for folder in folders:
    # Pattern: artifact-{title}-{token}
    # Token is always the last part after the last dash \(obcn...\)
    match = re.match\(r'artifact-\(.+\)-\(obcn\\w+\)$', folder\)
    if match:
        title = match.group\(1\)
        token = match.group\(2\)
        transcript_path = os.path.join\(base, folder, "transcript.txt"\)
        minutes_meta[token] = {
            "title": title,
            "token": token,
            "folder": folder,
            "transcript_path": transcript_path,
            "has_transcript": os.path.exists\(transcript_path\)
        }

print\(f"Total minutes with metadata: {len\(minutes_meta\)}"\)
print\(f"With transcript: {sum\(1 for v in minutes_meta.values\(\) if v['has_transcript']\)}"\)
# Show a few
for i, \(t, m\) in enumerate\(minutes_meta.items\(\)\):
    if i < 3:
        print\(f"  {m['title']} -> transcript: {m['has_transcript']}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, re, json

base = "./feishu-minutes"
results = []

for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(base\)\):
    if not f.endswith\('.md'\) or f.startswith\('feishu-minutes-sync'\):
        continue
    
    path = os.path.join\(base, f\)
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    
    # Extract frontmatter fields
    title_m = re.search\(r'title: "\(.+?\)"', content\)
    token_m = re.search\(r'minute_token: \(\\S+\)', content\)
    title = title_m.group\(1\) if title_m else f.replace\('.md',''\)
    token = token_m.group\(1\) if token_m else ''
    
    # Extract date and keywords from transcript
    date_m = re.search\(r'\(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\)\\s+\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}', content\)
    date = date_m.group\(1\) if date_m else ''
    
    kw_m = re.search\(r'关键词:\\s*\\n\(.+\)', content\)
    keywords = kw_m.group\(1\).strip\(\) if kw_m else ''
    
    # Get first 800 chars of actual transcript \(skip frontmatter + header\)
    body_start = content.find\('## 逐字稿'\)
    if body_start > 0:
        snippet = content[body_start:body_start+1200]
    else:
        snippet = content[:1200]
    
    results.append\({
        'title': title,
        'token': token,
        'date': date,
        'keywords': keywords,
        'snippet': snippet
    }\)

# Print summary
for r in results:
    print\(f"### {r['title']} \({r['date']}\)"\)
    print\(f"Keywords: {r['keywords'][:100]}"\)
    print\(\)

print\(f"\\nTotal: {len\(results\)} meetings"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os, re
from collections import Counter

base = "./feishu-minutes"
all_keywords = []
all_titles = []
date_topic = []

for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(base\)\):
    if not f.endswith\('.md'\) or f.startswith\('feishu-minutes-sync'\):
        continue
    path = os.path.join\(base, f\)
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    
    title_m = re.search\(r'title: "\(.+?\)"', content\)
    title = title_m.group\(1\) if title_m else ''
    all_titles.append\(title\)
    
    date_m = re.search\(r'\(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\)\\s+\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}', content\)
    date = date_m.group\(1\) if date_m else ''
    
    kw_m = re.search\(r'关键词:\\s*\\n\(.+\)', content\)
    if kw_m:
        kws = [k.strip\(\) for k in kw_m.group\(1\).replace\('、', ','\).replace\('，', ','\).split\(','\) if k.strip\(\)]
        all_keywords.extend\(kws\)
        date_topic.append\({'date': date, 'title': title, 'keywords': kws}\)

# Top keywords
kw_counter = Counter\(all_keywords\)
print\("=== TOP 50 高频关键词 ==="\)
for kw, cnt in kw_counter.most_common\(50\):
    print\(f"  {kw}: {cnt}"\)

# Co-occurrence clusters
print\("\\n=== 主题聚类（按时间演变） ==="\)
# Group by quarter
from itertools import groupby
date_topic.sort\(key=lambda x: x['date'][:7] if x['date'] else '0000'\)
for month, items in groupby\(date_topic, key=lambda x: x['date'][:7] if x['date'] else '0000'\):
    items = list\(items\)
    month_kws = Counter\(\)
    for it in items:
        month_kws.update\(it['keywords']\)
    top = ', '.join\([f"{k}\({v}\)" for k,v in month_kws.most_common\(8\)]\)
    print\(f"  {month}: {len\(items\)}场 | {top}"\)

# Identify topic clusters by keyword co-occurrence
print\("\\n=== 关键词共现聚类 ==="\)
pair_counter = Counter\(\)
for dt in date_topic:
    kws = list\(set\(dt['keywords']\)\)  # dedupe within meeting
    for i in range\(len\(kws\)\):
        for j in range\(i+1, len\(kws\)\):
            pair = tuple\(sorted\([kws[i], kws[j]]\)\)
            pair_counter[pair] += 1

print\("Top 30 共现词对:"\)
for pair, cnt in pair_counter.most_common\(30\):
    print\(f"  {pair[0]} ↔ {pair[1]}: {cnt}次"\)

PYEOF)
